extractive_fidelity.detail: 11/11 claims in logic/claims.md judged faithful (load-bearing numbers AND asserted direction/polarity both match, no unsupported added clauses) against the actual full paper text (research/metrics/v3/fulltext/tit26.txt), per a frozen independent adversarial check (extractive_fidelity/tit26-automated-high-throughput-quantification-of-plasma.yaml) run by a different pass than the compiler that wrote claims.md.
